_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of best practices in organizational conflict management.
reference_document_element_description: Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared objectives, working norms, and accountability structures across organizational boundaries.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-004 (SP, cosine: 0.455), LS-K-002 (LS, cosine: 0.450).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.0/10 (raw 0.202). Shared vocabulary: [organizational]. DCWF-only terms [best, conflict, knowledge, management, practices] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.892, R=0.866). P exceeds R by 0.026 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:73.8%, C:26.2%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of best practices in organizational conflict management." vs "Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared object" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.463 > STS 0.202 (gap +0.261). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [organizational] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.2%. Shared tokens: [organizational]. DCWF-only: [best, conflict, knowledge, management, practices]. WIDAI-only: [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.261 with low STS 0.202. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
